title: AI Filmmaking Workflow: How To Create AI Videos With Full Automation
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrates how to create a cinematic short film using TopView Drama Studio, an AI filmmaking tool. The workflow covers story building, character design, lighting planning, error correction, and final rendering, all managed within a single platform with no external crew.
